inkaR 0.6.6
  • Reference
    • Introduction to inkaR

Package index

Download Data

Functions to fetch indicator data from the INKAR API.

inkar()
Download INKAR Data (English Shortcut)
inkaR()
Download Data from INKAR (Interactive Alias)
inkaR-package
inkaR: Access the INKAR Database of the BBSR
get_inkar_data()
Download Data from INKAR
get_geographies()
Get Available Geographies or Region List

Browse & Search Indicators

Explore the local indicator metadata without hitting the API.

get_indicators()
List Available Indicators
search_indicators()
Search Indicators and Print Results
view_indicators()
View Indicators in RStudio Viewer
get_themes()
List Available Indicator Themes
update_indicators()
Refresh Local Indicators Metadata
indicators
INKAR Indicators Metadata

Interactive Wizard

Step-by-step guided selection for interactive sessions.

select_indicator()
Interactively Select an Indicator
select_level()
Interactively Select a Spatial Level
select_years()
Interactively Select Years

Analysis Helpers

Filter and compare downloaded data.

compare_regions() compare_region()
Filter Downloaded Data to Specific Regions
compare_districts() compare_district()
Filter Downloaded Data to Specific Districts
inkar_trends()
Plot Time Series Trends for INKAR Indicators

Visualization

Map and chart downloaded data.

plot_inkar()
Plot INKAR Data on German Maps
theme_inkaR()
Premium ggplot2 theme for inkaR

Caching

Manage the local API response cache.

clear_inkar_cache()
Clear INKAR Cache

On this page
